about_acknowledgements_desc: Built with appreciation for the open-source libraries and tools that make OrchOS possible.
about_core_item1_desc: Bookmarks, mail, calendar, boards — everything lives in one place. No more hunting across apps for what you need.
about_core_item2_desc: AI isn't bolted on; it's part of the fabric. From smart suggestions to automated workflows, AI helps you move faster without getting in the way.
about_core_item3_desc: Connect your own tools and services. OrchOS works with your existing accounts — GitHub, Gmail, Google Calendar, and more — so nothing gets left behind.
about_core_item4_desc: Built for speed. Navigate everything with shortcuts, search across all your content instantly, and get out of your own way.
about_future_p1: OrchOS is built to grow with you. We're adding deeper integrations, smarter AI features, and more ways to make your workspace truly yours — from custom views to automation rules that fit the way you work.
about_future_p2: This is just the beginning. OrchOS is a platform for how you work today, designed for how you'll work tomorrow.
about_problem1_desc: Bookmarks in one place, email in another, tasks scattered everywhere. OrchOS pulls it all together into a single workspace.
about_problem2_desc: Jumping between apps costs time and focus. OrchOS keeps everything in one window, so you stay in the flow.
about_problem3_desc: Too many tabs, too many notifications. OrchOS helps you organize, filter, and prioritize so you see what matters.
about_problem4_desc: Repetitive tasks eat your day. Let AI handle the routine so you can focus on the work that actually needs you.
about_user1_desc: Manage bookmarks, email, calendars, and projects from one place. Stay organized without the app fatigue.
about_user2_desc: Run your entire workflow — from saving ideas to shipping work — in a single workspace. No team required, no tool sprawl.
about_user3_desc: Share bookmarks, coordinate calendars, and keep everyone on the same page. Lightweight enough for a few people, powerful enough to grow.
about_why_p1: Your digital workspace should be as organized as your mind. OrchOS brings bookmarks, email, calendar, boards, and AI tools into one seamless experience — no more jumping between tabs.
about_why_p2: Every tool you use lives in its own silo. The question is: how do you bring them together? How do you save a link, track a deadline, manage your inbox, and review your projects without switching contexts?
about_why_p3: We believe your workspace should work for you, not the other way around. OrchOS gives you a unified home for the tools you use every day, with AI woven in to help you stay on top of it all.
allow_high_risk_install: I reviewed the warnings and still want to install this high-risk repository.
arch_feat_bun: Bun runtime for fast startup and low memory
arch_feat_elysia: TanStack Start server routes with type-safe APIs
arch_feat_i18n: Paraglide JS for first-class i18n support
arch_feat_react: React dashboard with TanStack Router & Zustand
architecture_desc: OrchOS runs on Bun with a unified TanStack Start app for UI and server routes. Agents run through native runtime adapters, and MCP servers extend capabilities without touching core logic.
auth_legal_prefix: By continuing, you agree to the OrchOS
auth_sign_in_error: Sign in failed. Please check your credentials.

auth_verification_code_sent: Enter the verification code sent to {email}.

auto_mode_on_desc: System will auto-fix problems as they arise
board_waiting_for_input: Waiting for input to start planning

calendar_delete_group_confirm: Delete "{name}" and all calendars and events inside it?

calendar_local_group_desc: Use groups to separate contexts such as personal planning, project delivery, or operations.
calendar_local_workspace_desc: This is your own calendar layer inside OrchOS: build groups, split work across multiple calendars, and keep events local without relying on Google.

feature_automation_desc: Create rules to automatically handle recurring problems. From auto-fixing test failures to assigning reviewers.
feature_goals_desc: Define goals with success criteria and constraints. Track progress through states, artifacts, and activity feeds.

hero_subtitle: Bookmarks, mail, projects, and AI — all in one workspace.
hero_tagline: Don't just generate code. Orchestrate it.
home_bento_agents_desc: Deploy and manage AI agents with specialized capabilities. Coordinate them to work together on complex tasks.
home_bento_calendar_desc: Plan your schedule with month, week, and day views. Add events, set reminders, and keep track of important dates.
home_bento_chat_input_hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line · {name}
home_bento_kanban_desc: Visualize your workflow with boards, columns, and cards. Drag and drop tasks across stages to track progress at a glance.
home_bento_mail_desc: Manage multiple email accounts in one inbox. Compose, reply, and organize messages with AI-powered assistance.
home_bento_mock_response_capabilities:
I can help you with:

1. **Agent Management** — Create, configure, and coordinate multiple AI agents
2. **Goal Tracking** — Set goals and let agents work toward them autonomously
3. **Code Generation** — Write, review, and refactor code across your projects
4. **Debugging** — Identify and fix issues in your codebase
5. **Integrations** — Connect with GitHub, Slack, Linear, Sentry, and more

What would you like to explore?
home_bento_mock_response_default: I'm OrchOS Agent, your AI assistant. I can help you orchestrate agents, manage goals, and automate workflows. What would you like to do?
home_bento_mock_response_help:
Here's how to get started with OrchOS:

1. **Create a Goal** — Define what you want to achieve
2. **Assign Agents** — Let OrchOS match the right agents to your goal
3. **Monitor Progress** — Track status in real-time from the dashboard
4. **Review Results** — Check outputs, PRs, and test results

Try asking me about any of these topics!

observability_desc: Monitor events, issues, and workspace activity.
onboarding_agents_desc: Set up AI agents first — register runtimes, configure capabilities, and get your agents online. Every other page in OrchOS builds on the agents you configure here.
onboarding_board_desc: Manage your work with a kanban board. Create tasks, set priorities, track progress, and let agents work on them autonomously.
onboarding_bookmarks_desc: Import and organize bookmarks from a file, group them into categories, and keep your reference links always at hand.
onboarding_calendar_desc: Keep your schedule in view alongside your projects. Create local calendars or connect Google Calendar to manage your time in one place.
onboarding_creation_desc: Chat with your agents, give instructions, and create content. This is your AI command center — describe what you want and let agents plan and execute.
onboarding_mail_desc: Connect your Gmail or IMAP/SMTP accounts and manage email without leaving the workspace.
onboarding_observability_desc: Monitor agent activity, system events, goal progress, and workspace health from a single overview.
orchos_desc: An AI-powered orchestration system for managing goals, agents, and workflows.
pair_any_machine_desc: Pair any machine running the OrchOS local CLI host, then keep its local runtimes visible inside your web workspace.

pairing_token_instructions: On the target machine, run this command with the pairing token below:
planner_reminders_desc: Scheduled follow-ups and recurring prompts from your planner.
pricing_cta_desc: Start orchestrating your AI agents and workflows today.
pricing_oss_desc: The complete open-source OrchOS experience. Self-host and customize freely.
pricing_free_desc: Cloud-hosted OrchOS with essential features for personal use.
pricing_faq_answer1: You can start with the Open Source or Free plan — no credit card required. As your needs grow, you can upgrade to Pro at any time.
pricing_faq_answer2: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
pricing_faq_answer3: Absolutely. We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. No questions asked.
pricing_faq_answer4: For detailed information, please refer to our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service. We take data security seriously.
pricing_faq_question2: Can I change my plan later?
pricing_hero_desc: Choose the plan that fits your workflow. From personal productivity to enterprise orchestration.
pricing_pro_desc: Unlock advanced features for power users and solo creators.
pricing_section_faq_desc: Everything you need to know about OrchOS pricing.
pricing_team_desc: Collaborate with your team and manage workflows together.
prefer_kanji_desc: Prefer more natural Japanese UI wording by reducing heavy Katakana usage in common terms.
privacy_intro: This policy explains what information OrchOS may process and how it is used to operate the product.
privacy_section_clerk_body: Authentication and certain identity-related workflows are managed through Clerk. When you sign in or sign up, relevant identity data is handled according to Clerk's infrastructure and policies.
privacy_section_collect_body: OrchOS may process account details, workspace configuration, connected integration metadata, and the content you choose to store or generate in the product.
privacy_section_contact_body: If you need clarification about privacy handling or want to request updates regarding your data, contact the OrchOS team.
privacy_section_use_body: Information is used to provide the product, support authentication, run integrations, improve reliability, and deliver the features you explicitly enable.
profile_basic_info_desc: These fields sync directly to your Clerk profile.
profile_email_verification_desc: Verification status of your primary email.
profile_login_email_desc: This email is read from Clerk and is view-only in this dialog.
profile_password_signin_desc: Whether password authentication is enabled for this account.
profile_preferences_info_desc: This area is reserved for user-level preferences. It can later include language, timezone, and notification preferences.
profile_two_factor_desc: Current two-factor authentication status from Clerk.
release_notes_desc: Track the latest updates and improvements in OrchOS
release_v01_desc: The first release of OrchOS — an AI workspace that works for you
runtimes_desc: Detect and register agent CLIs as runtimes to create Agent instances.
short_title_placeholder: A short, actionable title will read best here
shortcut_hints_desc: Display keyboard shortcut badges in the sidebar for quick navigation.
shortcuts_send_message_desc: Configure which key combination sends the message.
shortcuts_send_message_preview_desc: The highlighted control is the real send action next to the chat textarea. Changing this option updates which key combination triggers that same action.
shortcuts_send_message_preview_title: This setting changes the send button in the message input.
sign_in_desc: Use your Clerk account to access your OrchOS workspace.
sign_up_desc: Start with Clerk and get into your workspace in a few clicks.
skill_install_intro: Create a manual skill entry or import one from a repository after a safety review.
skill_install_requires_project: Project-scoped installs require an existing project.
states_will_appear: States will appear as the system runs
step_1_desc: Specify what you want to achieve with success criteria and constraints. OrchOS breaks it down into actionable tasks.
step_2_desc: OrchOS selects the best agents for each task based on capabilities. Monitor their work in real time through the dashboard.
step_3_desc: Set rules to auto-handle recurring problems. Review results, refine goals, and let the system improve over time.
subtasks_placeholder:
Review current spacing
Prepare updated mock
Share with team
tags_subtasks_hint: Tags and subtasks use one line per item.
team_cannot_remove_self: You cannot remove your own membership.
team_confirm_remove_member_desc: This user will lose access to the organization.
team_confirm_role_change_desc: This will update the member's organization role.
team_create_organization_desc: Create a new organization without opening Clerk's hosted UI.
team_invite_member_desc: Send an email invitation to add a teammate to this organization.
team_management_admin_only: Only organization admins can invite members or change roles.
team_management_create_org: Create an organization first to start inviting teammates and assigning roles.
team_management_desc: Invite teammates, review members, and manage organization access from OrchOS.
team_members_desc: Manage roles and remove members from the organization.
team_owner_protected: Owners cannot be managed by admins.
team_pending_invitations_desc: Review and revoke invites that have not been accepted yet.
terms_intro: These terms explain the basic rules for using OrchOS and its related services.
terms_section_accounts_body: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and any third-party integrations connected to OrchOS. Keep your credentials secure and revoke access when needed.
terms_section_contact_body: If you have questions about these terms, contact the OrchOS team before continuing to use the service.
terms_section_content_body: You retain responsibility for the content you create, store, or process through OrchOS. Review automated outputs before relying on them in production, legal, financial, or sensitive workflows.
terms_section_use_body: You may use OrchOS only in compliance with applicable laws and these terms. You are responsible for how you use connected tools, generated outputs, and automation features.
title: Title
title_concrete_hint: Keep the title concrete and let the notes hold the extra context.
use_mixed_script_desc: Display Korean text in mixed Hanja-Hangul writing system.
welcome_desc: Use OrchOS to organize bookmarks, mail, calendars, boards, and agents in one workspace.
